THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NOTIRA-NOTIRA.0-0r.ne: Support me, I want to become a Galgame god!!!
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.title: Cang Ling
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0.ancie: Warrior, your fire is too bright. Mind leaving it by the door before you come in?
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r.anci: You're still here. Good. Anger can wait too — wait until you're tired, and you'll sit down.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.IRONCLAD.2-0.ancie: If you must leave... take this. It's not a gift, it's a token for 'coming back next time.'
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.IRONCLAD.2-1.char: ...I'll take it. But I'll still be on my way.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.IRONCLAD.2-2.ancie: Good. A traveler needs one thing most: to know they'll return to some door.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.SILENT.0-0.ancient: Hunter, I won't ask your story. Just don't speak, and we're settled.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.SILENT.2-0.ancient: Silence is costly. If you can afford it, I'll keep this chair for you.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.SILENT.2-2.ancient: Good. The loudest sound is often saying nothing.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.DEFECT.0-0.ancient: Construct... your ticking is steady. Like a clock. Clocks understand waiting best.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.DEFECT.2-0.ancient: If you're looking for the answer to 'being fixed'... first learn to hold your questions in the air. Suspended, they won't break.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.DEFECT.2-2.ancient: Go. Carry your rhythm with you — don't let it rush you, let it keep you company as you wait.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.NECROBINDER.0-0.an: Lady, revenge has a queue too. Want a number?
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.NECROBINDER.1-0r.a: Your number hasn't been called yet. Don't rush. The longer hatred sits, the sharper the blade.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.NECROBINDER.2-0.an: If you must draw blood... at least don't let it splatter on what 'hasn't come yet.'
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.NECROBINDER.2-1.ch: ...I'll wait. Until the moment of reckoning comes.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.NECROBINDER.2-2.an: That's right. Waiting isn't weakness — it's sharpening the blade for a single swing.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.REGENT.0-0.ancient: Your Highness, a throne can be urgent, but tea must cool before it's drinkable.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.REGENT.1-0r.ancien: Welcome back, Your Highness. Today's wait costs the same as yesterday — but you can afford it.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.REGENT.2-0.ancient: If you command me... I have but one command in return: sit. Wait.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.REGENT.2-1.char: ...I, the King, can wait. But my subjects cannot wait long!
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.REGENT.2-2.ancient: Your subjects await results, but the throne awaits timing. If you want both, you must learn to wait for both.
NOTIRA-CANG_LING.talk.NOTIRA-NOTIRA.1-0r: I want to lie in a loli mom's arms and get hand-...
I want to be kept by a rich lady...
No good... I'm a... useless wife...
Can't even say oh-ho-ho, just cover my mouth and endure shamefully...
I have no protective heart, Notira-chan. Since birth, you've been tailor-made for my tastes.
